_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data life cycle involves taking responsibility for data governance structures and principles, and ensure that they’re defined and applied with best practice throughout a data life cycle; directing continuous improvements to optimise data governance over a data life cycle.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data governance program design, including operating model options, council structures, policy frameworks, stewardship network models, and escalation path architectures.
comments: DDaT skill equal WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-002 (DG, cosine: 0.698), DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.665).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.457). Shared vocabulary: [data, governance, structures]. DDaT-only terms [applied, best, continuous, cycle, defined, directing] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectures, council, design, escalation, frameworks, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.849, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 39-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Data life cycle involves taking responsibility for data governance structures an" and "Knowledge of data governance program design, including operating model options," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.718 > STS 0.457 (gap +0.261). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, governance, structures] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.9%. Shared tokens: [data, governance, structures]. DDaT-only: [applied, best, continuous, cycle, defined, directing]. WIDAI-only: [architectures, council, design, escalation, frameworks, knowledge].
